mnemonics.title: Mercer's Conditions
mnemonics.content: SPF: Symmetric, Positive semi-definite, Finite energy

visualTips.visualization: Imagine folding paper to make classes separable without drawing complex curves
Picture data points lifted into 3D space where separation becomes easier

analogies.analogy: Like using X-ray vision to see hidden patterns (high-dimensional structure)
Similar to camera focus - high gamma sees individual pixels, low sees whole image
